title: Beans Backpacks
description: A Backpack mod where Aesthetics meet Functionality. Overhauls Minecraft's inventory by building on the Bundle's mechanics.
body:
Overhauls Minecraft Inventory by building on the Bundle's mechanics to increase functionality and ease of use. Includes specified bundle mecanics such as a reliable Lunch Box to the unique Alchemy Bag.

I haven't gotten around to making this page look good. For the time being, check out [the wiki!](https://github.com/BeansGalaxy/Beans-Backpacks-3/wiki)

![Custom Backpacks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/o4TtgIhD/images/2cdb351d26fb00ccf5fbc41122a1b76e8da61131.png)
